title: PlayerCommand
description: Command message delivered from decision-optimizer to player via WebSocket. ICD-4 contract. Player must enforce ordering by sequence_number and apply idempotency by command_id.

command_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this command. Used by player for idempotent application. Must be treated as already-applied if seen again.

sequence_number.description: Monotonically increasing sequence number per session. Player must not apply a command with a lower sequence_number than the last applied command.

produced_at.description: UTC RFC 3339 timestamp when this command was produced by the decision engine.

activate_creative.description: Payload for command_type='activate_creative'. Required when command_type is 'activate_creative'.

manifest_id.description: Identifier of the approved creative manifest to activate. Must reference a manifest the player has already received or can fetch.

min_dwell_ms.description: Minimum dwell duration before this creative may be switched, in milliseconds.

cooldown_ms.description: Minimum time after this creative ends before the same creative may be reactivated, in milliseconds.

rationale.description: Human-readable explanation of why this creative was selected. Used for explainability and dashboard display.

freeze.description: Payload for command_type='freeze'. Instructs the player to hold the current creative and stop accepting activate_creative switch commands. The freeze is lifted when the decision-optimizer recovers and sends an activate_creative command — that command implicitly unfreezes the player and switches to the new creative. There is no separate unfreeze command; activate_creative IS the unfreeze.

safe_mode.description: Payload for command_type='safe_mode'. Instructs the player to switch to the static fallback bundle and ignore further activate_creative commands until cleared.

reason.description: Machine-readable reason for entering safe mode.
